name: collector skips in-terminal micro-survey for Satisfaction when satisfaction opt-in is not enabled
command:
mkdir -p space && printf 'dimensions:
  satisfaction: {opt_in: true, enabled: false}
share: never
' > space/config.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/collector.sh" --metric satisfaction-survey --config space/config.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'satisfaction_skipped=opt_in_not_set' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
